title: Inspect database client-pool acquisition pressure
safe_investigation_steps: Inspect database client-pool utilization and connection acquisition latency over the same interval as the application error rate.
Compare active database connections with the configured connection limit without changing either value.
Confirm whether migration lock waits are absent or materially lower before treating connection-pool pressure as the relevant precedent.
Review whether retry volume, readiness failures, or resource pressure align with the period of connection acquisition delay.
Record the smallest unresolved verification facts before treating this precedent as applicable.
unsafe_or_out_of_scope_actions: Do not increase connection limits, alter pool settings, restart services, or change timeout values from this evidence packet.
Do not treat high active connections alone as proof that the client pool is the primary failure.
Do not surface this procedure as applicable when migration lock waits or connection-acquisition evidence are unknown.
